added_items.final_wording: Defines dysphonia and hoarseness, describes voice-quality changes, common causes, vocal demand, tobacco exposure, reflux context, and prevention topics.

source.title: Clinical Practice Guideline: Hoarseness (Dysphonia) (Update) – official fact sheet and key action statements
source.population: Patients of all ages with dysphonia or hoarseness.
source.exclusions: Exact for dysphonia assessment and escalation; referral pathways require UAE clinician review.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines dysphonia and hoarseness, describes voice-quality changes, common causes, vocal demand, tobacco exposure, reflux context, and prevention topics.

added_items.rationale: Supports dysphonia or hoarseness terminology, voice change, clinician-observed voice quality, duration, and selected history fields.

added_items.final_wording: Requires history and examination for modifying factors and expedited laryngeal evaluation for neck mass, respiratory distress or stridor, tobacco history, recent procedures, and persistent symptoms.
